subject: IGY all the way!
body:
Dearest Jeffrey!
Of course you had to be the first person to know! I'm not sure how it
happened, but I will start working for IGY in the M&A team!
I didn't expect much when I came there for my first interview, but I've been
blown away by their success; the friendly, smart people and the
professionalism.

So I'm back in the Epstein-sphere and I'm very happy to be  :)

Much love,
-- 
Cecilia Steen
Dubai Mobile +971 50 940 2062
body_html:
Dearest Jeffrey!
Of course you had to be the first person to know! I'm not sure how it happened, but I will start working for IGY in the M&A team!
I didn't expect much when I came there for my first interview, but I've been blown away by their success; the friendly, smart people and the professionalism.
 
So I'm back in the Epstein-sphere and I'm very happy to be  :)
 
Much love,
--
Cecilia Steen
